reasoning: The composited system_pause_icon_v00 appears in the scene as a large orange/yellow rectangular card roughly 90x90px — approximately 3x the reference player size of 32x32. It also exceeds player size, triggering the explicit 'item bigger than player' error condition. At this scale it reads as a world-space prop or collectible rather than a compact UI icon. Perspective (top-down orthographic) is consistent with the scene, so no perspective error, but scale failure is disqualifying.
